title: ge.manifest.json — ge apply desired state
description: Generated from tools/lib/reconcile.mjs's normalizeManifest()/planReconcile() by tools/gen-manifest-schema.mjs — do not edit; run `bun run manifest:schema`. `ge apply` diffs this against actual platform/fleet state and plans the drift in dependency order (gateway -> data -> tool plane -> agents); `ge apply --yes` executes it.

_comment.description: Free-text note for humans reading the manifest — ignored by ge apply.

platform.description: Platform planes to bring up, opt-in — declare what must be up before the fleet is provisioned.

data.description: Data plane: shared stores (ge data up).

mcp.description: Tool plane: per-department MCP services (ge mcp deploy).

fleet.description: Target stage and which agents to converge on it.

mode.description: Build locally via the harness, or submit to the cloud factory.

target.description: Stage every selected agent should converge to (run-ledger's LEDGER_STAGES).

agents.description: "all" (every agent in the catalog), or an explicit list of agent ids.
